title: Best Charity Legacy Giving and Planned Giving Tools 2026
description: Compare leading legacy giving solutions including LegacyPlanner, PlannedGiving Pro, and BequestBuilder. Facilitate planned gifts and manage legacy donation programs.
content:
Best Charity Legacy Giving and Planned Giving Tools 2026

Legacy giving addresses the planned contribution needs of organizations seeking long-term donor commitments. Planned giving tools enable bequest facilitation, legacy program management, and planned gift administration that creates sustainable organizational funding. In 2026, planned giving platforms have evolved to provide comprehensive legacy giving capabilities that facilitate long-term donor commitments.

The Planned Giving Imperative for Nonprofit Sustainability

Long-term funding addresses sustainability needs, with planned gifts that provide future organizational funding. Organizations benefit from planned gifts that create sustainable revenue streams. Planned giving tools enable long-term funding, supporting organizational sustainability. These planned giving capabilities support future funding.

Bequest facilitation addresses estate giving needs, with processes that enable donors to include organizations in estate plans. Organizations need systematic bequest facilitation. Planned giving tools enable bequest processes, supporting estate giving. These bequest capabilities support planned contributions.

Legacy program management addresses systematic planned giving administration, with programs that manage planned gift commitments. Organizations need systematic planned giving programs. Planned giving tools enable program management, supporting legacy administration. These program capabilities support planned gift oversight.

Donor stewardship addresses planned gift donor relationships, with ongoing stewardship that maintains planned giving commitments. Organizations need stewardship for planned gift donors. Planned giving tools enable stewardship, supporting legacy donor relationships. These stewardship capabilities support planned donor engagement.

Leading Legacy Giving Platforms Reviewed

1. LegacyPlanner

LegacyPlanner has established itself as a comprehensive planned giving platform, providing bequest facilitation, legacy program management, and planned gift administration tools. The platform addresses estate giving, planned gift tracking, and legacy donor stewardship through unified system. This comprehensiveness makes LegacyPlanner suitable for organizations seeking systematic planned giving management.

The bequest module enables estate giving facilitation, with tools for facilitating bequest commitments. Organizations can facilitate bequests, enabling estate gifts. The platform handles bequest facilitation, supporting planned gifts. These bequest capabilities enable estate contributions.

LegacyPlanner's program features enable legacy program administration, with tools for managing planned giving programs. Organizations can administer legacy programs, managing planned gifts. The platform handles program management, supporting planned giving oversight. These program capabilities enable systematic administration.

The tracking features enable planned gift monitoring, with visibility into planned gift commitments and status. Organizations can track planned gifts, understanding legacy commitments. The platform handles planned gift tracking, providing legacy visibility. These tracking capabilities support planned gift oversight.

The stewardship features enable legacy donor engagement, with tools for stewarding planned gift donors. Organizations can steward legacy donors, maintaining planned gift relationships. The platform handles legacy stewardship, supporting planned donor engagement. These stewardship capabilities enable legacy donor relationships.

LegacyPlanner offers pricing based on planned giving program scope and organizational needs, with options accessible for moderate legacy programs and scaling for comprehensive planned giving. Organizations seeking systematic planned giving may find LegacyPlanner's breadth provides appropriate capability.

2. PlannedGiving Pro

PlannedGiving Pro positions itself as a planned giving platform emphasizing planned gift administration efficiency. The platform provides tools for efficient planned gift processing and administration. This efficiency focus makes PlannedGiving Pro suitable for organizations seeking streamlined planned giving operations.

The administration module enables efficient planned gift processing, with tools for processing planned gifts efficiently. Organizations can process planned gifts efficiently, streamlining administration. The platform handles planned gift administration, supporting efficient processing. These administration capabilities enable streamlined operations.

PlannedGiving Pro's gift types features enable diverse planned gift handling, with support for various planned gift types including bequests, charitable remainder trusts, and gift annuities. Organizations can handle diverse planned gifts, supporting multiple gift types. The platform handles gift type management, supporting planned gift variety. These gift type capabilities enable diverse planned giving.

The documentation features enable planned gift record-keeping, with tools for documenting planned gift details. Organizations can document planned gifts, creating comprehensive records. The platform handles planned gift documentation, supporting record-keeping. These documentation capabilities enable planned gift records.

The communication features enable planned gift donor contact, with tools for communicating with planned gift donors. Organizations can communicate with planned gift donors, maintaining relationships. The platform handles planned gift communication, supporting donor contact. These communication capabilities enable planned donor engagement.

PlannedGiving Pro offers pricing based on planned giving administration efficiency and organizational needs, with options representing streamlined processing capability. Organizations seeking efficient planned giving may find PlannedGiving Pro's efficiency focus provides appropriate capability.

3. BequestBuilder

BequestBuilder has established itself as a planned giving platform with emphasis on bequest program building. The platform provides tools for building organizational bequest programs that create planned giving opportunities. This bequest focus makes BequestBuilder suitable for organizations seeking to establish and grow bequest programs.

The bequest building module enables program creation, with tools for building organizational bequest programs. Organizations can build bequest programs, creating planned giving opportunities. The platform handles bequest program creation, supporting planned giving development. These building capabilities enable bequest program establishment.

BequestBuilder's outreach features enable bequest promotion, with tools for promoting bequest opportunities to donors. Organizations can promote bequests, encouraging planned gifts. The platform handles bequest outreach, supporting planned giving promotion. These outreach capabilities enable bequest marketing.

The education features enable donor planned giving education, with tools for educating donors about planned giving options. Organizations can educate donors, informing about planned gifts. The platform handles planned giving education, supporting donor information. These education capabilities enable donor planned giving awareness.

The tracking features enable bequest monitoring, with visibility into bequest commitments and progress. Organizations can track bequests, understanding planned gift status. The platform handles bequest tracking, providing planned gift visibility. These tracking capabilities support bequest oversight.

BequestBuilder offers pricing based on bequest program building scope and organizational needs, with options representing bequest development capability. Organizations seeking bequest program growth may find BequestBuilder's bequest focus provides appropriate capability.

Planned Giving Platform Comparison Overview

Gift Type VarietyExcellentExcellentGoodLegacyPlanner/PlannedGiving Pro: Diverse gifts
EfficiencyGoodExcellentGoodPlannedGiving Pro: Streamlined processing

StewardshipExcellentGoodGoodLegacyPlanner: Legacy donor engagement
TrackingExcellentGoodExcellentLegacyPlanner/BequestBuilder: Monitoring
CommunicationGoodExcellentGoodPlannedGiving Pro: Donor contact

Planned Giving Strategy for Nonprofit Organizations

Effective planned giving requires strategic approach beyond platform selection. Organizations should develop planned giving plans that define legacy objectives, program priorities, and stewardship approaches. These plans guide platform configuration and ensure systematic planned giving. Organizations should consider donor demographics, legacy opportunities, and organizational sustainability when developing planned giving strategy.

Donor identification guides planned giving focus, with identification of donors suitable for planned giving cultivation. Organizations should identify planned giving prospects, directing cultivation efforts. Prospect identification improves planned giving effectiveness. Organizations should identify planned giving candidates, guiding legacy focus.

Donor education supports planned giving awareness, with education that informs donors about planned giving options. Organizations should educate donors, building planned giving understanding. Education improves planned giving success. Organizations should implement planned giving education, supporting donor awareness.

Future Developments in Planned Giving Technology

Planned giving technology continues to evolve, incorporating new capabilities and adapting to changing donor estate planning preferences. Digital planned giving is advancing, with platforms enabling electronic planned gift documentation. Digital documentation improves planned giving efficiency, enabling streamlined processes. These digital capabilities support modern planned giving.

Integrated estate planning is developing, with platforms connecting with estate planning professionals and tools. Integration improves planned gift facilitation, enabling coordinated estate planning. These integration capabilities support comprehensive planned giving. Organizations benefit from estate planning connections.

Automated stewardship is emerging, with platforms providing automated planned donor stewardship. Automated stewardship improves legacy donor engagement, ensuring systematic contact. These automation capabilities support planned donor relationships. Organizations benefit from automated stewardship.

Analytics-based prospect identification is maturing, with platforms applying analytics that identify planned giving prospects. Analytics improves prospect identification, targeting appropriate donors. These analytics capabilities support intelligent prospect finding. Organizations benefit from data-driven prospect identification.

As nonprofits evaluate planned giving options in 2026, the potential for sustainable funding is substantial. By selecting platforms aligned with planned giving needs and implementing systematic legacy programs, organizations can build planned giving programs that create long-term organizational funding.
author: Planned Giving Director
